subcodes.first_line: O thou respected personage: Thy letter was received. Its perusal imparted to me great hopefulness, for from its contents it became manifest
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخص محترما نامه شما رسید و از قرائتش امیدواری عظیم حاصل شد زیرا از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @material and spiritual existence; two books
